Description: Damage taken is reduced while HP recovered via healing actions is increased.
Damage taken is reduced while HP recovered via healing actions is increased. Movement speed is also increased.

Name: Doom
Description: Certain death when counter reaches zero.

Name: Terror
Description: Frozen with fear and unable to execute actions.

Name: Disease
Description: Movement speed and HP recovery via healing magic are reduced.

Name: Hysteria
Description: Unable to act on your own free will.

Name: Playing with Fire
Description: Entranced by the beauty of fire. Will be unable to resist moving toward a specific fire-aspected target when this effect expires.

Name: Playing with Ice
Description: Entranced by the beauty of ice. Will be unable to resist moving toward a specific ice-aspected target when this effect expires.

Name: Pyromania
Description: Unable to resist moving toward a specific fire-aspected target.

Name: Cryomania
Description: Unable to resist moving toward a specific ice-aspected target.

Name: Phantom Mastery
Description: Benefiting from masterful knowledge of a phantom job. Damage dealt and healing potency are increased.

Name: Balanced Party
Description: In a party with other adventurers of similar knowledge levels. Phantom EXP gained from combat is increased.

Name: Duties as Assigned
Description: Unable to change to another class or job, including phantom jobs.

Name: Battle High
Description: The thrill of combat is enhancing various capabilities.

Description: Damage taken is reduced.

Name: Pray

Name: Enduring Fortitude
Description: Damage taken is reduced.

Name: Pledge
Description: Impervious to most damage for one strike.

Description: Damage dealt is increased.

Description: Movement speed is increased.

Name: Shirahadori

Description: Damage dealt is increased.

Description: Damage dealt is increased.

Description: A magicked barrier is nullifying damage.

Description: Damage dealt is increased.

Name: Suspend

Description: Movement speed is increased.

Name: Silver Sickness
Description: Damage dealt is reduced and damage taken is increased.
